title: Yapı Kredi Yayınları
content: Yapı Kredi Yayınları ("Yapi Kredi Publications" in English) is one of the biggest publishing houses in Turkey. Based in Istanbul and active since 1992, as of end of 2013 it has published 4000 titles in philosophy, literature, the arts, and children's books. It has printed more than 2 million copies in 2013. It is a member of the Turkish Publishers Association.
